title: Verify cold-start cache — disk hydration populates controller before hooks mount

steps.description: Controller market cache should be populated from disk at construction time
steps.expression: (function() { var keys = Object.keys(Engine.context.PerpsController.state.cachedMarketDataByProvider); var count = 0; for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) { var entry = Engine.context.PerpsController.state.cachedMarketDataByProvider[keys[i]]; if (entry && entry.data) count += entry.data.length; } return JSON.stringify({keys: keys, count: count}) })()

steps.description: Controller user cache should be populated from disk at construction time
steps.expression: (function() { var keys = Object.keys(Engine.context.PerpsController.state.cachedUserDataByProvider); var result = {keys: keys, hasData: false}; for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) { var entry = Engine.context.PerpsController.state.cachedUserDataByProvider[keys[i]]; if (entry && entry.positions) { result.hasData = true; result.positions = entry.positions.length; result.orders = entry.orders ? entry.orders.length : 0; } } return JSON.stringify(result) })()
(function() { var d = Engine.context.PerpsController.getCachedMarketDataForActiveProvider({skipTTL: true}); return JSON.stringify({hasData: d != null, count: d ? d.length : 0}) })()

(function() { var d = Engine.context.PerpsController.getCachedUserDataForActiveProvider({skipTTL: true}); if (!d) return JSON.stringify({hasData: false}); return JSON.stringify({hasData: true, positions: d.positions ? d.positions.length : 0, orders: d.orders ? d.orders.length : 0}) })()

steps.description: Verify positions are available from controller
steps.expression: Engine.context.PerpsController.getPositions().then(function(ps) { return JSON.stringify({count: ps.length, symbols: ps.map(function(p) { return p.symbol })}) })
